MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Ott, plaintiff and moving party appearing telephonically
David B. Golden of Golden Kopcke, LLP, 399-9994 for defendant and responding party

Ruling:
Argued, and the Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DENNIS OTT'S Motion Of Objection To Order Sustaining Defendant's Demurrer To 3rd Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend; Motion For Statement Of Decision; Motion For Judgment is denied. CCP section 632 only applies after trial of a question of fact. A hearing on demurrer is not a trial and a demurrer involves only decisions regarding questions of law. Questions of fact are not considered on demurrer. In short, no statement of decision is required in this context under the code section cited by plaintiff or by any other code section. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/HE) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
